---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

We are happy to answer any questions regarding the **The First National Conference on Bioactive Molecules: From Characterization to Innovative Biotechnological Applications**.

Whether your inquiry concerns abstract submission, registration, accommodation, or the scientific program, please do not hesitate to contact us.

---

## Conference Secretariat

**The First National Conference on Bioactive Molecules (NCBM 2026)**

**Conception and Application of Bioactive Molecules (CAMBio) Laboratory**

Higher National School of Biotechnology (ENSB) – Taoufik Khaznadar

Ali Mendjeli University Campus

Constantine, Algeria

---

## Contact Information

📧 **Email: ncbm@ensbiotech.edu.dz**

☎ **Telephone**: +213 5 50 84 74 87

🌐 **Website**: https://www.ensbiotech.edu.dz

---

## Office Hours

| Day | Hours |
|------|-------|
| Sunday – Thursday | 08:30 – 16:30 |
| Friday & Saturday | Closed |

---

## Contact the Organizing Committee

For inquiries regarding:

- Abstract submission
- Registration
- Payment
- Invitation letters
- Certificates
- Accommodation
- Visa support (international guests)
- Technical assistance

please contact the conference secretariat by email.

---


::: {.callout-important}

## We're Here to Help

The Organizing Committee is committed to making your participation as smooth and enjoyable as possible.

If you have any questions before or during the conference, please don't hesitate to contact us.

We look forward to welcoming you to **NCBM 2026** in Constantine!

:::
